understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile (+) by navigating the grid, removing breakable blocks with clicks, and falling through passages, while avoiding spike hazards.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is horizontal only (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT). After a horizontal move, the character falls in the current gravity direction until landing on a solid tile, spike, or gem. CLICK removes breakable blocks (x) at a specified position; clicks do not consume turn-based platform timers. UNDO reverts the last action. Spike tiles (u/v) cause instant failure on landing. Solid tiles (o, m, w) support the character. The structured state shows left_landing and right_landing to preview fall outcomes, and corridor_scan reveals passages to new y-levels.
